message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "TaskExecutionStrategy" as TES1 #90EE90# 
participant "Action" as A1 #ADFF2F#  
box "" #LightGray# [hidden]
  participant Connection #E6E6FA#
end box 

actor SSH_client_server_connection_boundary_3458764513820541024 <<boundary>> boundary "#SSH client/server connection#" #D3D3D3#  

control ssh_daemon_or_winrm_service_control_3458764513820541024 control "#ssh daemon (or winrm service)#" #CFCFFF#  


TES1 ->>A1:init(..)   
note right of A1 : init() called on Action object to initialize module arguments   

TES1->>A1:init(..)    
note left of TES1: second call initializes internal state for execution context    

TES1-->A1:run()     
activate A1       
alt successful run      
    note over A1,TES1:return JSON result from executed task        
else failed run         
     alt error during setup          
         return exception message back up stack trace            
      else runtime failure occurred              
           log details about what went wrong before returning null value                
        end if           
   endif deactivate all participants involved in this flow path including nested ones like connections etc..


@enduml
